data.body: AC amendment: figma-merge.py must emit FIGMA_MERGE_OUTPUT JSON to stdout on both success and error. Contract: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/figma-merge-output.md. Fields: {status, components_added, components_modified, components_removed, behavioral_specs_preserved, warnings}. This stdout output is parsed by figma-resync.py (5250-e85b) to populate change summary and metadata comment.
